top_signals.title: Policy paper: Alternative Investment Fund Managers Regulation – Draft SI and Policy note
top_signals.summary: Draft legislation to reform the regulatory framework for Alternative Investment Fund managers, streamlining the regulation to support growth and tailoring for UK markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
top_signals.summary: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Three firms raided over suspected Seven-Eleven refrigeration bid-rigging
top_signals.summary: The three companies are suspected of having prearranged winners in bids for refrigeration equipment contracts held every few years by Seven-Eleven Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
